atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left shoulder pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left shoulder pain for the last three weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient states the pain is not getting better.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain in his left hand.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as constant.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient notes the pain is worse when he sleeps.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports difficulty reaching for things.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports difficulty lifting anything.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient doesn't want to put his hands over his head because it causes so much pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports trouble sleeping because of the pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has not had any previous shoulder pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies taking any medications for the pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports that Tylenol usually helps.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Examination reveals limited active and passive range of motion in the left shoulder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: There is tenderness to palpation of the greater tuberosity of the humerus.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The capillary refill is less than three seconds in the left hand.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Sensation is intact to light touch in the left arm.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: No tenderness is palpated at the sternoclavicular or acromioclavicular joints.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's symptoms are most likely due to a rotator cuff tendinopathy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Order an MRI of the left shoulder to further evaluate the rotator cuff.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Refer the patient to physical therapy for a six to eight week course of treatment.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Continue Tylenol as needed.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Follow up in four weeks if symptoms do not improve.
